name: Divya Sharma
title: Soft Skills Trainer | Branch Manager | Psychology Student

about.intro: I'm Divya Sharma — a passionate Soft Skills Trainer, Branch Manager, and Psychology student dedicated to empowering individuals through communication, emotional intelligence, and leadership.

story.title: Started with Science
story.description: Built a strong academic foundation with PCB at Kendriya Vidyalaya, followed by M.Sc at DAV College — developing analytical thinking and discipline that would later shape my training approach.

story.title: Entered the Training World
story.description: Discovered my true passion for teaching and mentoring. Began working with government projects, transforming young minds through structured soft skills training programs.

story.title: Naandi Foundation & CSR Projects
story.description: Joined Naandi Foundation and led impactful CSR initiatives including Mahindra Pride Classroom, Skill Bridge Program, and Digital Equalizers for Girls — training 1000+ students across multiple states.

story.title: Focal Skill & TOT Certification
story.description: Became a TOT Certified Trainer at Focal Skill, conducting government training projects, developing training materials, and facilitating large-scale workshops.

story.title: Branch Manager at Himalaya Gramin Nidhi
story.description: Took on the role of Branch Manager, overseeing branch operations, loan processing, team management, market analysis, and community relations in the financial sector.

story.title: Pursuing MA Psychology
story.description: Currently pursuing MA Psychology at IGNOU to deepen understanding of human behavior, emotional intelligence, and counseling — bridging training expertise with psychological insights.

about.mission: Empowering people through communication, emotional intelligence, and leadership.

quote: Empowering individuals through communication, confidence, and continuous learning.
